description: Security profile for Client Manager CAP application

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ClientManagerAdmin
scopes.description: Full access to Client Manager services

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.ClientManagerViewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to Client Manager services

role-collections.name: ClientManager_Admin
role-collections.description: Role collection for Client Manager administrators

role-collections.name: ClientManager_Viewer
role-collections.description: Role collection for Client Manager read-only users
